name: master_attestation_001
description: Master attestation envelope per D0006 §6 with the master-attestation external_aad domain tag (extends D0006 §8 by analogy per cairn_recovery::DOMAIN_TAG). Payload schema matches cairn_recovery::attestation (master pubkey at key 1, operational_identity pubkey at key 2, timestamp uint at key 3). Signing key = the master (which is also key 1 in the payload — masters sign their own attestations directly, no capability-token wrapping). This vector also matches the pinned D0006 §7 reference test vector for issuer_cert_hash discovery (master seed 0x42, op identity seed 0x37, timestamp 1700000000).
expected_issuer_cert_hash_derivation_com: issuer_cert_hash := SHA-256(sig_structure_cbor_hex) per D0006 §7. This is the same reference vector pinned in cairn_recovery::attestation::tests::issuer_cert_hash_pinned_test_vector_d0006_section_7.
verification_expectation: Decoding envelope_cbor_hex via COSE_Sign1::from_bytes and verifying against master_verifying_key_hex with external_aad_hex must succeed. The Rust-side reference implementation pins this in crates/cairn-envelope/tests/test_vectors.rs::vector_master_attestation_001.
